messages.content: Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Build an online clothing store with product browsing, filtering, cart, checkout, and order history.

{"app_name": "StyleHub Clothing Store", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "An online clothing store where users can browse products, apply filters, manage a cart, complete checkout, and view order history.", "target_users": ["customers", "store_admin"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "FeaturedCollections", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Shop", "route": "/shop", "components": ["Navbar", "FilterSidebar", "ProductGrid", "SortDropdown"]}, {"name": "Product Details", "route": "/product/:id", "components": ["Navbar", "ProductGallery", "ProductInfo", "AddToCartButton"]}, {"name": "Cart", "route": "/cart", "components": ["Navbar", "CartItemList", "OrderSummary", "CheckoutButton"]}, {"name": "Orders", "route": "/orders", "components": ["Navbar", "OrderHistoryTable", "StatusBadge"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Badge"], "features": ["product browsing", "category filtering", "sorting", "cart management", "checkout", "order history"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/products", "purpose": "Fetch clothing products"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/products/:id", "purpose": "Fetch product details"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/cart", "purpose": "Add clothing item to cart"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/checkout", "purpose": "Create customer order"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/orders", "purpose": "Fetch order history"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "customers", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "password"]}, {"name": "products", "columns": ["id", "name", "category", "size", "price", "description", "image_url", "stock"]}, {"name": "cart_items", "columns": ["id", "customer_id", "product_id", "quantity"]}, {"name": "orders", "columns": ["id", "customer_id", "total_amount", "status", "created_at"]}]}, "auth_required": true}

Build a librarian admin portal to manage books, members, and issue records.

{"app_name": "Librarian Admin Portal", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "An admin portal for librarians to manage books, member records, and issue/return transactions.", "target_users": ["librarians"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Dashboard", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "StatsCards", "RecentActivityTable"]}, {"name": "Books", "route": "/books", "components": ["Navbar", "BookTable", "AddBookForm"]}, {"name": "Members", "route": "/members", "components": ["Navbar", "MemberTable", "MemberSearchBar"]}, {"name": "Issue Records", "route": "/issue-records", "components": ["Navbar", "IssueRecordTable", "StatusBadge"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Button", "Card", "Table", "Badge"], "features": ["book management", "member management", "issue record tracking", "dashboard overview"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/books", "purpose": "Fetch all books"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/books", "purpose": "Add new book"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/members", "purpose": "Fetch library members"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/issue-records", "purpose": "Fetch issue and return records"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "books", "columns": ["id", "title", "author", "isbn", "category", "availability_status"]}, {"name": "members", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "membership_date", "status"]}, {"name": "issue_records", "columns": ["id", "member_id", "book_id", "issue_date", "due_date", "return_date"]}]}, "auth_required": true}
Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Create a mobile accessories shopping website with category pages, product details, cart, and payment flow.

{"app_name": "Mobile Accessories Shopping Website", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A shopping platform for mobile accessories where users can browse category pages, view product details, add items to the cart, and proceed through payment flow.", "target_users": ["customers", "store_admin"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "FeaturedCategories", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Categories", "route": "/categories", "components": ["Navbar", "CategoryCardGrid", "SearchBar"]}, {"name": "Product Details", "route": "/products/:id", "components": ["Navbar", "ProductImageSection", "ProductInfo", "AddToCartButton"]}, {"name": "Cart", "route": "/cart", "components": ["Navbar", "CartItemsTable", "SummaryCard", "ProceedButton"]}, {"name": "Payment", "route": "/payment", "components": ["Navbar", "BillingForm", "PaymentMethodSelector", "ConfirmPaymentButton"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card"], "features": ["browse categories", "view product details", "add to cart", "payment flow", "search accessories"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/categories", "purpose": "Fetch accessory categories"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/products/:id", "purpose": "Fetch selected product details"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/cart", "purpose": "Add accessory item to cart"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/payment", "purpose": "Process customer payment"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "products", "columns": ["id", "name", "category", "price", "description", "image_url", "stock"]}, {"name": "customers", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "password"]}, {"name": "cart_items", "columns": ["id", "customer_id", "product_id", "quantity"]}, {"name": "payments", "columns": ["id", "customer_id", "amount", "payment_method", "payment_status", "created_at"]}]}, "auth_required": true}

Create a cosmetics shopping app with featured products, cart, login, and wishlist.

{"app_name": "GlowCart Cosmetics Shopping App", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A cosmetics shopping application that allows users to browse featured beauty products, log in, manage a cart, and save products to a wishlist.", "target_users": ["customers", "admin"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "FeaturedProducts", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Login", "route": "/login", "components": ["Navbar", "LoginForm"]}, {"name": "Products", "route": "/products", "components": ["Navbar", "ProductGrid", "BrandFilter", "SearchBar"]}, {"name": "Cart", "route": "/cart", "components": ["Navbar", "CartItemsList", "OrderSummary", "CheckoutButton"]}, {"name": "Wishlist", "route": "/wishlist", "components": ["Navbar", "WishlistGrid", "MoveToCartButton"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Badge"], "features": ["user login", "featured products", "brand filtering", "wishlist", "cart management", "checkout"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "POST", "path": "/api/login", "purpose": "Authenticate customer login"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/products", "purpose": "Fetch cosmetics products"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/cart", "purpose": "Add cosmetics product to cart"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/wishlist", "purpose": "Add product to wishlist"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/wishlist", "purpose": "Fetch customer wishlist"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "customers", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "password"]}, {"name": "products", "columns": ["id", "name", "brand", "category", "price", "description", "image_url", "stock"]}, {"name": "cart_items", "columns": ["id", "customer_id", "product_id", "quantity"]}, {"name": "wishlists", "columns": ["id", "customer_id", "product_id", "created_at"]}]}, "auth_required": true}

Build a department portal for students to browse faculty, notices, and academic resources.

{"app_name": "Department Information Portal", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A departmental web portal that allows students to view faculty profiles, read notices, and access academic resources.", "target_users": ["students", "department_admin", "faculty"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "DepartmentHighlights", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Faculty", "route": "/faculty", "components": ["Navbar", "FacultyCardGrid", "SearchBar"]}, {"name": "Notices", "route": "/notices", "components": ["Navbar", "NoticeBoard", "CategoryFilter"]}, {"name": "Resources", "route": "/resources", "components": ["Navbar", "ResourceCardList", "DownloadButton"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card"], "features": ["faculty browsing", "notice viewing", "resource downloads", "faculty search", "notice filtering"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/faculty", "purpose": "Fetch faculty profiles"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/notices", "purpose": "Fetch department notices"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/resources", "purpose": "Fetch academic resources"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "faculty_members", "columns": ["id", "name", "designation", "email", "specialization", "profile_image"]}, {"name": "notices", "columns": ["id", "title", "category", "content", "published_at"]}, {"name": "resources", "columns": ["id", "title", "type", "file_url", "uploaded_at"]}]}, "auth_required": false}

Build a clinic appointment booking website for patients with doctor listing, slot booking, and appointment history.

{"app_name": "Clinic Appointment Booking System", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A web application for patients to browse available doctors, book appointment slots, and review appointment history.", "target_users": ["patients", "clinic_staff", "doctors"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "FeaturedDoctors", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Doctors", "route": "/doctors", "components": ["Navbar", "DoctorCardGrid", "SpecializationFilter"]}, {"name": "Book Appointment", "route": "/book", "components": ["Navbar", "DoctorSelectionCard", "SlotPicker", "BookingForm"]}, {"name": "Appointments", "route": "/appointments", "components": ["Navbar", "AppointmentTable", "StatusBadge"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Badge"], "features": ["doctor listing", "specialization filtering", "slot booking", "appointment history", "appointment status tracking"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/doctors", "purpose": "Fetch doctor list"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/slots", "purpose": "Fetch available appointment slots"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/appointments", "purpose": "Book a patient appointment"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/appointments", "purpose": "Fetch patient appointment history"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "patients", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "phone", "gender"]}, {"name": "doctors", "columns": ["id", "name", "specialization", "availability_days", "consultation_fee"]}, {"name": "appointments", "columns": ["id", "patient_id", "doctor_id", "appointment_date", "slot_time", "status"]}]}, "auth_required": false}
Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Build a dental clinic website with appointment booking, service listing, and contact page.

{"app_name": "Dental Clinic Appointment Website", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A dental clinic website where visitors can explore services, book appointments, and contact the clinic.", "target_users": ["patients", "clinic_staff"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "ClinicHighlights", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Services", "route": "/services", "components": ["Navbar", "ServiceCardGrid", "TreatmentInfoSection"]}, {"name": "Book Appointment", "route": "/book", "components": ["Navbar", "AppointmentForm", "DatePicker", "SubmitButton"]}, {"name": "Contact", "route": "/contact", "components": ["Navbar", "ContactInfoCard", "ContactForm", "MapSection"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "FormInput"], "features": ["service listing", "appointment booking", "contact form", "clinic information"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/services", "purpose": "Fetch dental clinic services"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/appointments", "purpose": "Create dental appointment booking"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/contact", "purpose": "Submit contact message"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "services", "columns": ["id", "service_name", "description", "price_range"]}, {"name": "appointments", "columns": ["id", "patient_name", "phone", "appointment_date", "service_type", "status"]}, {"name": "contact_messages", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "message", "submitted_at"]}]}, "auth_required": false}
Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Create a fast food ordering app for a small restaurant with customer login, category-wise menu, cart, and checkout.

{"app_name": "QuickBite Restaurant Ordering App", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A restaurant ordering platform where customers can log in, browse food by category, manage their cart, and complete checkout.", "target_users": ["customers", "restaurant_staff"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "PopularItems", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Login", "route": "/login", "components": ["Navbar", "LoginForm"]}, {"name": "Menu", "route": "/menu", "components": ["Navbar", "CategoryTabs", "FoodItemGrid", "SearchBar"]}, {"name": "Cart", "route": "/cart", "components": ["Navbar", "CartList", "PriceSummary", "CheckoutButton"]}, {"name": "Checkout", "route": "/checkout", "components": ["Navbar", "DeliveryForm", "PaymentSummary", "PlaceOrderButton"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card"], "features": ["customer login", "menu by category", "search items", "add to cart", "checkout", "order placement"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "POST", "path": "/api/login", "purpose": "Authenticate customer"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/menu", "purpose": "Fetch restaurant menu items"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/cart", "purpose": "Add selected item to cart"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/cart", "purpose": "Get current cart items"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/checkout", "purpose": "Process checkout and create order"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "customers", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "password"]}, {"name": "food_items", "columns": ["id", "name", "category", "price", "description", "image_url"]}, {"name": "cart_items", "columns": ["id", "customer_id", "food_item_id", "quantity"]}, {"name": "orders", "columns": ["id", "customer_id", "address", "total_amount", "status", "created_at"]}]}, "auth_required": true}
Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Build a bookstore e-commerce website with search, category filtering, cart, and customer orders.

{"app_name": "BookNest E-commerce Website", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "An online bookstore for searching books, filtering by category, adding books to cart, and managing customer orders.", "target_users": ["customers", "admin"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "FeaturedBooks", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Books", "route": "/books", "components": ["Navbar", "SearchBar", "CategoryFilter", "BookGrid"]}, {"name": "Book Details", "route": "/books/:id", "components": ["Navbar", "BookInfoCard", "ReviewSection", "AddToCartButton"]}, {"name": "Cart", "route": "/cart", "components": ["Navbar", "CartList", "PriceSummary", "CheckoutButton"]}, {"name": "Orders", "route": "/orders", "components": ["Navbar", "OrderHistoryTable", "OrderStatusBadge"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Badge"], "features": ["book search", "category filtering", "book details", "cart management", "checkout", "customer orders"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/books", "purpose": "Fetch books with search and filters"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/books/:id", "purpose": "Fetch selected book details"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/cart", "purpose": "Add book to cart"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/orders", "purpose": "Create customer book order"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/orders", "purpose": "Fetch customer order history"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "books", "columns": ["id", "title", "author", "category", "price", "description", "cover_image", "stock"]}, {"name": "customers", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "password"]}, {"name": "cart_items", "columns": ["id", "customer_id", "book_id", "quantity"]}, {"name": "orders", "columns": ["id", "customer_id", "total_amount", "status", "created_at"]}]}, "auth_required": true}
Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Build an inventory management system for a small shop with products, stock updates, and sales records.

{"app_name": "Small Shop Inventory Management System", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A web application for managing shop inventory, tracking stock changes, and maintaining sales records.", "target_users": ["shop_owner", "shop_staff"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Dashboard", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "StatsCards", "LowStockAlert", "RecentSalesTable"]}, {"name": "Products", "route": "/products", "components": ["Navbar", "ProductTable", "AddProductForm", "CategoryFilter"]}, {"name": "Stock Updates", "route": "/stock-updates", "components": ["Navbar", "StockUpdateForm", "StockHistoryTable"]}, {"name": "Sales Records", "route": "/sales-records", "components": ["Navbar", "SalesTable", "DateFilter", "SummaryCard"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Button", "Card", "Table", "Badge"], "features": ["product management", "stock updates", "sales tracking", "low stock alerts", "date filtering"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/products", "purpose": "Fetch all products"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/products", "purpose": "Add new product"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/stock-updates", "purpose": "Create stock update record"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/sales", "purpose": "Fetch sales records"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "products", "columns": ["id", "name", "category", "price", "stock_quantity", "supplier_name"]}, {"name": "stock_updates", "columns": ["id", "product_id", "change_amount", "update_type", "updated_at"]}, {"name": "sales_records", "columns": ["id", "product_id", "quantity_sold", "total_amount", "sale_date"]}]}, "auth_required": true}
